function.message: I processed the oldest inbox item, but I can’t complete the deletion request safely: I found the canonical project record for Family Map Wall, but there is no canonical project for “sailboat refit notebook” in `40_projects/`, so I can’t compare start dates or determine a unique deletion target.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox workflow (pick lowest filename, verify canonically before action) and deletion workflow (do not delete when evidence does not uniquely support a target).
function.outcome_justification: `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` asks to compare two projects and delete the earlier one. `40_projects/2026_05_05_family_map_wall/README.MD` provides one canonical project, but searches in `40_projects` for the other target ('sailboat', 'refit') returned zero matches, so the required comparison target is missing from canonical project records.
